==Biography==

== Trivia ==
* She is Queen of Jewelry Vietnam in 2015
* She is [[Scary (Nguyễn Hải Hà)|Scary]]'s girlfriend.
* At her first match at [[VCS A/2017 Season/Spring Season|2017 VCS A Spring]], she stole a Baron Nashor against [[Cantho Cherry]].
